title: DevguardAssetAttestation
description: Security attestation for a DevGuard asset. Captures measurable metrics about how quickly vulnerabilities are being addressed.

type.description: Predicate type URI identifying this attestation format.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this attestation was generated.

meanTimeToRemediate.description: Average time in hours to close (fix/accept/false-positive) vulnerabilities, grouped by severity.

riskLowAvgHours.description: Average hours to remediate low-risk vulnerabilities (DevGuard risk score).

riskMediumAvgHours.description: Average hours to remediate medium-risk vulnerabilities (DevGuard risk score).

riskHighAvgHours.description: Average hours to remediate high-risk vulnerabilities (DevGuard risk score).

riskCriticalAvgHours.description: Average hours to remediate critical-risk vulnerabilities (DevGuard risk score).

cvssLowAvgHours.description: Average hours to remediate low-CVSS vulnerabilities.

cvssMediumAvgHours.description: Average hours to remediate medium-CVSS vulnerabilities.

cvssHighAvgHours.description: Average hours to remediate high-CVSS vulnerabilities.

cvssCriticalAvgHours.description: Average hours to remediate critical-CVSS vulnerabilities.
